content:
A summary of every Ultra Realm awakener. This is meant to be a description of what they generally do, how they play, what enlightens they require, and anything else a new player might want to know. This is the Finale in a 4 part series that will provide the same overview for all realms.
https://youtu.be/EzxRMB0ljbk

content:
A little venture I made to see how much Pollux can "skip" parts of the Chapter 9 boss, similar to how GDoll's [End of Illusion] does which lets you clear it before the adds come into the fight. I didn't know I could just... oneshot the boss entirely though. @~@
https://youtu.be/Uk0wXzQKWGY

embeds.title: Arc 1 Final Boss Oneshot - Arc 1 H9-11; Fastest Clear Possible
embeds.description:
This stage in itself probably deserves an entire guide. I've seen so many people in the recent clears struggle a lot and a majority of them kind of forget that you can get a 2.44x~ Max HP increase using the Blood Pools just before the boss...

Hope you enjoy the clear! ^^
